infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 HUNGARIAN GRAND PRIX 23 - 25 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 14:50, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Oracle Red Bull Racing Document 15 Date 24 July 2026 Time 14:10 No / Driver 3 - Max V

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 HUNGARIAN GRAND PRIX
23 - 25 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 14:50, in relation to the
incident below: 
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Oracle Red Bull Racing
Document 15
Date 24 July 2026
Time 14:10
No / Driver 3 - Max Verstappen
Reason Alleged breach of Appendix L, Chapter IV, Article 2 e) of the International Sporting
Code – Turn 12 incident – alleged erratic driving by the driver of car 3 at 13:35.
Garry Connelly Matthew Selley
Richa Mergulhao Vitantonio Liuzzi
István Moni
